title: 『ウグイス,ホトトギスにならず』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is a few days away and
Sakura Chiyono O has been working hard, driven
by her intense passion for the race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Peel as you might, the layers of an onion are
limitless"! I still have so many things I have to do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But if I stay on this path and don't stray from it,
I'm sure I'll be able to catch up to Maruzen one
day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On another day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! Listen to this, listen to this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen invited me to run in a scrimmage against
her!
choice_data_list: Wow, that's great! When will it be?
Wow, that's great! When will it be?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! Oh, it's this weekend! Wait, why are you
so enthusiastic about it?
choice_data_list: It's your dream to run against her, isn't it?
It's your dream to run against her, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when... when that happens, when I'm
stronger... Will you run with me again?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. It's always been my dream.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's always been the one I want to become, the
one I admire, the one I want to stand side-by-side
with... because she's my rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day on, Sakura Chiyono O begins to
research how to beat Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes is a good place to
start when it comes to analyzing Maruzen's races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Just look at her speed and incredible race sense.
And that delighted smile she has on when she's...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Why does Maruzen's running look—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, we hear a frustrated scream echo
through the halls.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The source of the commotion is Sweep Tosho, a
racer who dreams of becoming a witch like her
grandmother, and Mr. C.B., a Triple Crown
champion.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I already told you! Grandma said there's no
medicine like that!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Then let me speak directly to this grandmother of
yours. Not because I doubt you, of course. I truly
believe in her abilities. That's why I want to talk.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, too bad! She's my grandma, not yours!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: ...That went poorly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, C.B.?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
If you're here to scold me for all the noise, there's
no need. I'm already done with my business... Oh?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O? You're running with Maruzen
this weekend, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Tell me something... do you have to race her now? Can't you delay that race for a later time, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I just... can't accept this. I miss the Hot Rod and
have been waiting for her to shift into gear once
again.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
And I'm telling you this now, Chiyono O. Your
wish will never come true.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Are you saying that I'll never be able to beat
Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not what I mean. There is something
even more important to you and Maruzen than
that.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You want to be like Maruzensky, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: But does that mean you want to replace her?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-no! Maruzen is Maruzen! No one can replace
her!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, if that's the case, I wouldn't continue down
this path you're going down. You'll live to regret
it.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen will never be your rival. She'll just leave
you in the dust—abandon you.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
...Along with all her personal baggage. You sure
you want that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... Sorry, I don't really understand what you're
saying...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
No, I think you do. Surely you've noticed that
far-off look in the Beast's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Mr. Trainer. This is something only racers
can comprehend. Just like there are some things
only our supporters can understand.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Ms. Trainer. This is something only racers
can comprehend. Just like there are some things
only our supporters can understand.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
The answer isn't something you can search for,
either. If she doesn't have an answer right now,
then she never will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the day of Sakura Chiyono O and
Maruzensky's scrimmage arrives.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Chiyo, great job at the Derby! You've improved
sooo much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, then! Let's race! This'll be a Derby for
just you and me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(And now, my long-awaited scrimmage with
Maruzen begins...)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Time to burn some rubber!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(The Hot Rod is right in front of me, her
incredible legs going so fast, they look like
they're slicing the air into pieces.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...She's fast. But today, I—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Remember the Derby. Remember how it felt to
race against your rivals, to run with all the
strength you have!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Feel their intense determination on your skin,
and—)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Keep running and running until you overtake me.
If you can make it, then I'll give you one last
present...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So go on and fly past me, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Oh... I think I know what C.B. was saying now.)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo?! What's wrong? Do your legs hurt?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Thank goodness. I was worried you'd
gotten injured. But goodness, why did you stop
right in the middle of a race?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're not afraid of losing to me at all, are you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've studied all of your races. I rewatched all of
them to prepare for this scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And I realized something while looking over them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling you've never felt desperate in a
race. You've never been afraid to lose.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen... It's amazing how your life changes
when you have rivals. You can work and run
harder than you ever thought possible.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My rivals are the reason I've been able to become
this strong. They make me race with everything I
have.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, what am I to you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're... You're my cute little underclassman
who looks up to me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've wanted to be like you since forever
ago. But it's more than just wanting to be like
you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I want to become as strong and special an
Umamusume as you are...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And I want to be your rival!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But there's no fire in your heart. It's like you've
already given up. Like losing here is exactly the
outcome you're looking for.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, that's—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I'll just have to work hard until I become
someone worthy of challenging you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Until I become worthy of being your rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I reach that point and you still don't feel scared
of losing to me, then I'll simply work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll force you to push yourself harder than ever
just to keep up with me. I'll fire up the engines
you've never used before.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Even if you say that, it's too late. I've already—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I don't want things to end like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I... I know how fantastic it is to run with your
whole soul and being, and I want you to run for
real too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Please watch me, Maruzen. But don't watch me grow, watch me run.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky, I swear that I, Sakura Chiyono O,
will become your rival!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have a favor to ask you for our next
goal race.
choice_data_list: What do you want to run next?
What do you want to run next?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to run against only classic-year
racers. I want to run in the autumn Tenno Sho and
pit my speed against senior racers too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's where I'll light that fire in Maruzen's heart.
